message: Pin http-server in CI; clarify viz helper text

files.patch:
@@ -45,7 +45,7 @@ jobs:
           bun-version: latest
       - name: Install test tooling (Playwright + http-server)
         run: |
-          bun add -d playwright@1.48.2 http-server
+          bun add -d playwright@1.48.2 http-server@14.1.1
           bunx playwright install chromium
       - name: Serve and smoke-test with Playwright (Chromium headless)
         env:

@@ -189,8 +189,9 @@

Benchmark Playground

Real-time render for WASM; JS baseline runs headless and reports timing.
-
WASM uses the Rust CMA-ES with SIMD (if enabled); chart drives the visible step loop.
-
Baseline JS is a simple (μ+λ) strategy in vanilla JS for rough speed comparison.
+
WASM uses the Rust CMA-ES with SIMD (if enabled); chart drives the visible step loop on a 2D surface.
+
Baseline JS is a simple (μ+λ) strategy in vanilla JS for speed comparison.
+
Bounds/noise settings apply to the optimizer; visualization shows the 2D slice.
